character.name: > Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A towering blood-pact warrior in jagged black plate armor spattered with dried gore, sharp spiked pauldrons. Massive serrated cleaver-sword held one-handed, trophy skulls chained to belt. Helm is a featureless dark iron mask with two glowing red slits for eyes — no facial detail visible. Gold-trim etched runes along the gauntlets and chestplate. Steam rising off the armor. Palette: blood red `#8B0000`, black `#000000`, burnished gold `#C9A961`. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
